raw_text: Hi, this is Ward 3B. There's been a fluid spill in the bay 4 bathroom and it needs a cleanup before the next patient is moved in. Could someone from environmental services come up when they get a chance? Thanks.

Hi, this is Ward 3B. There's been a fluid spill in the bay 4 bathroom and it needs a cleanup before the next patient is moved in. Could someone from environmental services come up when they get a chance? Thanks.

actions.detail: Confirmation message drafted for the requester.
actions.artifact:
Thank you for getting in touch. We've logged your environmental services request for the bay 4 bathroom on Ward 3B and routed it to the EVS team.

A team member will attend within the standard service window. If the situation changes or becomes more urgent before then, please contact the operations desk directly so we can update the priority accordingly.

We appreciate you letting us know promptly.
